A-02.evidence: ACTUAL EXECUTION (2026-05-13): `cd D:/project/topvel_project/topvel-grid-monorepo && npx --yes pnpm@8.15.0 -r --filter './packages/*' exec tsc --noEmit` → EXIT=0, output lines=0 (no errors, no warnings) across all 13 packages. tsconfig.base.json strict:true + noImplicitAny:true + exactOptionalPropertyTypes:true + skipLibCheck:false confirmed (Read 2026-05-13 lines 12-18). AC-004 satisfied.

A-03.evidence: ACTUAL EXECUTION (2026-05-13): tsup build artifacts confirmed via Get-ChildItem across all 13 packages — grid, grid-core, grid-export, grid-features, grid-license, grid-pro-agg, grid-pro-datamap, grid-pro-header, grid-pro-master, grid-pro-merging, grid-pro-range, grid-pro-tracking, grid-renderers. Each package shows dist/index.cjs=True, dist/index.mjs=True, dist/index.d.ts=True (39 files total, AC-003 satisfied). Sampled grid-core/dist/index.cjs ('use strict' + sourceMappingURL), index.mjs (sourceMappingURL), index.d.ts ('export {  }') — real tsup output, CJS+ESM+DTS dual format. tsup.config.ts confirmed format:['cjs','esm'] + dts:true + sourcemap:true + outExtension producing .cjs/.mjs. size-limit portion intentionally deferred to G-003 (spec Section 1 L1: 'F-00-03 size-limit (G-003)') — does not block A-03 because tsup build itself passes.

B-01.evidence: B category (sort/filter/page/virtualization/edit) — G-002 is infrastructure (build pipeline). No runtime grid component implemented in this Goal. src/index.ts is 'export {}' across 13 packages. Vacuous truth allowed: B category entirely N/A → categoryScore = 100 per ADR-MOD-GRID-00-002. Vacuous ban does NOT apply to B (only A has build/tsup keyword guard).
